title: Jet Alone
wikitext:
[]: Jet Alone [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 4:45 pm I was thinking that there could be a possibility of Jet Alone appearing in 3.0/Final. In the main series it only really served as filler, however I think that JA could be incorporated into Rebuild as somewhat of a JSDF super weapon, possibly being piloted by Mari. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Mon Jan 18, 2010 4:48 pm With all the stuff left to cover, I don't think there's any time for Jet Alone. But like with everything else, it could be interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 4:53 pm I'm not saying add a section "just Jet Alone" in Rebuild but somehow incorporate it into the story or maybe even a FINAL BOSS. Actually Shinji in Tengen Toppa Evangelion Unit 01 vs. Crazed Mari in Super-mode Jet Alone would be kinda interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 18, 2010 5:04 pm chaosakita wrote: With all the stuff left to cover, I don't think there's any time for Jet Alone. But like with everything else, it could be interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 5:09 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: chaosakita wrote: With all the stuff left to cover, I don't think there's any time for Jet Alone. But like with everything else, it could be interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 18, 2010 5:28 pm Mad wrote: similar to an Eva except for the fact that it is purely mechanical. It wouldn't have an AT field but could possibly compensate with more advanced armor.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 6:46 pm Right I was thinking along the lines o Jet Alone Prime. When I say Shinji v. Mari, I was kidding. An Eva would thrash JA, but whose to say JA couldn't take on some Angels or at least assist the Evangelions?

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Mon Jan 18, 2010 6:59 pm I couldn't really see Jet Alone being able to assist the Evangelions much without an ATF however if they made a few of them they could follow unit 01 around saying "Don't forget to reload Mr. Ikari" and "Sorry Mr. Ikari" when they get bumped into.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 18, 2010 7:26 pm Mad wrote: whose to say JA couldn't take on some Angels or at least assist the Evangelions?

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 7:48 pm Once again nuclear technology crushes my dreams. ;-;

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:15 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Mad wrote: whose to say JA couldn't take on some Angels or at least assist the Evangelions?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:25 pm wonderluster wrote: Kamikaze Alone?

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:45 pm Sparring Partner Alone?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:54 pm Mad wrote: Sparring Partner Alone?

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 10:06 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Mad wrote: Sparring Partner Alone?

[]:             Quote Post by Hotrod93 » Tue Jan 19, 2010 5:21 pm Well they could include him first with Shinji Stoping him then later the use him to blow up a angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jan 19, 2010 5:34 pm Hotrod93 wrote: later use it to blow up a angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Tue Jan 19, 2010 5:40 pm Unless they can launch JA into orbit and penetrate Arael's A.T Field, then self destruct it... yeah Jet Alone is useless. sigh, oh well

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Wed Jan 20, 2010 7:16 pm I always thought of Eva Unit 05 as a replacement for Jet Alone.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 20, 2010 7:29 pm 'cept Unit-05 was actually useful.

In the main series it only really served as filler, however I think that JA could be incorporated into Rebuild as somewhat of a JSDF super weapon, possibly being piloted by Mari. SPOILER: Show
